message:
refactor(traits): Replace inline type checks in 14 more files

Continue trait-based refactoring across codegen and analysis:

Codegen files:
- expressions/calls.zig, dict.zig, misc.zig
- main/generator.zig
- statements/assign/aug_assign.zig, type_handling.zig, value_generation.zig
- statements/control/loops/for_basic.zig, for_special.zig
- statements/misc.zig

Analysis files:
- native_types/statements.zig, inferrer.zig, expressions.zig
- native_types/calls/method_calls.zig

All files now use centralized trait functions:
- type_traits.isUnknown(), isIntegral(), isFloating(), isBoolean(), isNone()
- string_traits.isString(), isBytes(), isStringLike()
- container_traits.isList(), isDict(), isTuple(), isSet(), isArray()
